nodes.label: Celery Task: collect_all (ticker/metadata)
Celery Task: collect_5m (OHLCV 5m candles)
Bulk UPSERT: market_metadata (anti-deadlock, sorted by symbol)
_run_async: event loop teardown with asyncpg hard-terminate
PostgreSQL Table: market_metadata
PostgreSQL Table: ohlcv (TimescaleDB)
Redis Key: scalpyn:last_collect_all_start (diagnostics marker)
Redis Key: scalpyn:collect_all_runs (counter)
Persistence Queue: OhlcvBatch message (collect-5m path)
Persistence Queue: MarketMetadataUpsert message
Stale volume_24h fallback: per-symbol Gate ticker for symbols missing volume_24h_updated_at > 10min
Savepoint 2: orderbook metrics UPSERT (spread_pct, orderbook_depth_usdt)
Celery Task: pipeline_scan (L1→L2→L3 every 5m)
Redis Key Prefix: spe:pipeline:{watchlist_id}:signals (L3 prior-signal snapshot)
L3 Live Order Flow Injection: overwrites taker_* / buy_pressure / volume_delta from Redis buffer
L3 Order Flow Window: default 60s (configurable via pipeline config)
L3 Order Flow Max Age: default 15s (staleness gate for WS buffer)
Pipeline Asset Staleness Threshold: default 30 minutes (auto-mark down)
get_order_flow_data: aggregate taker buy/sell (WS buffer → REST fallback)
_read_buffer: ZRANGEBYSCORE on trades_buffer:{market_type}:{symbol}
Redis Sorted Set: trades_buffer:{market_type}:{normalized_symbol} (Gate WS spot/futures trades)
Redis Key: gate_ws:last_handover_ms (WS leader handover tombstone)
safe_taker_ratio: buy/(buy+sell), range [0,1], None on zero-activity window
_aggregate_buy_sell: build return dict with audit metadata (n_trades, coverage_pct, partial_window, data_age_seconds)
REST Fallback: GET /spot/trades (limit=500, cap detection for partial windows)
Handover Taint Window: 60s (marks partial_window=True when WS leader recently changed)
Redis Fallback Aggregator: 5-minute windowed log of symbols that hit REST fallback
Order Flow Window Default: 60s (WINDOW_SECONDS), 300s used by compute_indicators tasks
MarketDataService: centralized market data (Gate primary, Binance fallback)
fetch_ohlcv: Gate.io primary (≥50 candles), Binance fallback+merge
MIN_OHLCV_CANDLES = 50 (threshold to trigger Binance merge)
fetch_all_tickers: GET /spot/tickers (bulk, filters ETF/stablecoins)
fetch_orderbook_metrics: spread_pct + orderbook_depth_usdt + bid_ask_imbalance (depth=10)
MarketDataNormalized: symbol, price, volume_base/quote, orderbook_depth, spread_pct, bid_ask_imbalance, orderbook_pressure, taker_ratio, volume_delta
_extract_orderbook_metrics: bid_ask_imbalance = (Σbid_qty - Σask_qty)/(Σbid_qty + Σask_qty), range [-1,+1]
_extract_taker_metrics: isBuyerMaker inversion for Binance taker buy/sell computation
Taker volume from Binance trades (isBuyerMaker field, unavailable on Gate spot)
Gate.io REST: GET /spot/candlesticks (OHLCV)
Gate.io REST: GET /spot/tickers
Gate.io REST: GET /spot/order_book
Gate.io REST: GET /futures/usdt/funding_rate
Confidence scores: gate=0.7, mixed=varies (seed_service DEFAULT_INDICATORS fallback_config)
OHLCVBackfillService: chunk-based historical backfill (Gate.io, idempotent)
backfill_symbol: backwards-in-time chunks, 180 days default, max 3 retries
_validate_candle: OHLC relationship check (l<=o<=h, l<=c<=h), positive values, datetime timestamp
Backfill rate limit: 0.5s delay, exponential backoff on 429/5xx
OHLCV Prometheus Metrics: ohlcv_ingest_received_total, ohlcv_ingest_persisted_total, ohlcv_staleness_seconds
Staleness Alert Threshold: ohlcv_staleness_seconds > 1800 triggers ingestion_stale alert
OHLCVRepository: bulk_insert (batch 1000), get_earliest/latest_timestamp, count_records, get_data_gaps
ohlcv unique constraint: ON CONFLICT (time, symbol, exchange, timeframe) DO NOTHING
get_data_gaps: generate_series LEFT JOIN ohlcv for gap detection by timeframe
Supported timeframes: 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d (seconds mapping)
parse_gate_spot_candle: [ts, quote_vol, close, high, low, open, base_vol] → normalized dict
Base volume fallback: quote_volume/close when candle[6] absent
SpotScanner: async spot engine (user-scoped, FeatureEngine + ScoreEngine + GateAdapter)
SpotScanner._get_indicators: get_klines 1h limit=200, FeatureEngine.calculate(df)
Default feature config: RSI(14), ADX(14), EMA(5,9,21,50,200), ATR(14), MACD(12,26,9), VWAP, Stochastic(14,3,3), OBV, Bollinger(20,2σ), ParabolicSAR(0.02,0.2), ZScore(20), volume_delta
SpotScanner macro filter: BTC < EMA200(1d, limit=210) → risk-off, skip buys
SpotScanner scan interval: cfg.scanner.scan_interval_seconds (configurable)
FuturesScanner: 4-gate pipeline (portfolio risk, macro, liquidity, score) + 5-layer scoring
FuturesScanner SCAN_INTERVAL = 60s
FuturesScanner L1: fetch_and_score liquidity (hard_reject threshold)
FuturesScanner L2: score_structure (multi-timeframe, l2_timeframes from config)
FuturesScanner L2 primary timeframe: 1h (for direction determination)
FuturesScanner L3: score_momentum (primary_df 1h, direction)
FuturesScanner L4: score_volatility (primary_df 1h, ATR-based vol_regime)
FuturesScanner L5: fetch_order_flow_data + score_order_flow (funding_rate guard)
Funding guard: long blocked if funding > funding_extreme, short blocked if funding < -funding_extreme
Gate 3: min_score_to_trade + min_layer_score for all 5 layers
FuturesScanner: get_klines per contract per l2_timeframe, limit=200, market=futures
robust_indicators package (Task #211): deterministic scoring, confidence tracking
IndicatorEnvelope: value + source + timestamp + confidence + staleness_seconds + status (VALID/DEGRADED/NO_DATA/INVALID)
DataSource enum: GATE_TRADES, GATE_CANDLES, GATE_TICKER, GATE_ORDERBOOK, BINANCE_TRADES, BINANCE_CANDLES, BINANCE_TICKER, MERGED, CANDLE_FALLBACK, DERIVED, UNKNOWN
CONFIDENCE_MAP: GATE_TRADES=1.0, BINANCE_TRADES=0.95, GATE_ORDERBOOK=0.90, GATE_TICKER=0.85, GATE_CANDLES=0.85, BINANCE_CANDLES=0.80, DERIVED=0.80, CANDLE_FALLBACK=0.40, UNKNOWN=0.30
STALENESS_PENALTY: 0-60s=1.0x, 60-180s=0.85x, 180-300s=0.50x, >300s=0.10x (applied to base confidence)
compute_indicators_robust: FeatureEngine + order_flow_service (300s window) + envelope_indicators
envelope_indicators: flat dict → name→IndicatorEnvelope mapping (skips audit metadata keys)
_DEFAULT_SOURCE_BY_INDICATOR: RSI/ADX/EMA/MACD→GATE_CANDLES, taker_ratio/buy_pressure/volume_delta→GATE_TRADES, spread_pct/orderbook_depth→GATE_ORDERBOOK, volume_24h→GATE_TICKER
No candle approximation rule: without order-flow data, taker_ratio/volume_delta are dropped (not proxied from candles)
calculate_score_with_confidence: deterministic score = matched_points/total_points * 100 (no confidence weighting)
ScoreResult: score, score_confidence, can_trade, rejected, components (liquidity/market_structure/momentum/signal), matched_rules, global_confidence
can_trade threshold: score >= 65 AND score_confidence >= 0.60 AND global_confidence >= 0.60
validate_indicator_integrity: 5 CRITICAL rules (bucket exclusivity, critical NO_DATA, flow primary source, derived dependencies, sufficient candles)
CRITICAL_INDICATORS: (rsi, adx, macd, ema50) — missing = partial score, not rejection
FLOW_PRIMARY_SOURCES: GATE_TRADES, BINANCE_TRADES, MERGED (candle fallback rejected as flow source)
Bucket exclusivity: taker_buy + taker_sell <= base_volume * 1.05, volume_delta == buy - sell within 5% tolerance
LONG_WARMUP_INDICATORS: (ema200, adx, rsi, macd_histogram) — sufficient candles check
DERIVED_DEPENDENCIES: macd_histogram←(macd, macd_signal_line), ema9_gt_ema50←(ema9, ema50), ema50_gt_ema200←(ema50, ema200), atr_pct←(atr)
compute_asset_score: envelope_indicators + calculate_score_with_confidence → score/score_confidence/global_confidence/matched_rules
robust_futures_direction_bias: [-1,+1] from ema9_gt_ema50, ema50_gt_ema200, macd_histogram sign, rsi zone (>55=long, <45=short)

Robust Indicators Prometheus: indicator_computation_duration_seconds, indicator_confidence, indicator_staleness_seconds, score_rejection_total, exchange_request_latency_seconds, gate_ws_connected, gate_ws_is_leader, gate_trades_received_total
PostgreSQL Table: indicator_snapshots (UUID, symbol, timestamp, indicators_json JSONB, global_confidence, score, can_trade)
STRICT_META_FIELDS: volume_24h, market_cap, price, current_price, change_24h, change_24h_pct, price_change_24h, spread_pct (NULL=FAIL, not SKIP)
Pipeline levels: POOL → L1 → L2 → L3 (each requires upstream)
STRICT_META_MIN_COVERAGE_RATIO=0.10: relax strict meta filters when < 10% symbols have metadata
evaluate_rejections: block_rules + filters + entry_triggers + signals → (approved_assets, rejection_logs)
build_trace_asset: merge indicators_json (wins) + market_metadata → trace dict (resolves alias spellings)
Block rule negative polarity: math PASS = block TRIPPED = asset rejected (outcome=TRIPPED)
Indicator field aliases: bb_width↔bollinger_width, volume_24h↔volume_24h_usdt, atr_pct↔atr_percent, orderbook_depth_usdt↔orderbook_depth
recompute_rejection_trace: live recompute from current indicators (Rejected tab, avoids SEM DADOS false-negatives)

hyperedges.label: 5m OHLCV Ingestion Pipeline (collect_5m → ohlcv table → compute chain)
Order Flow Data Path: WS buffer (primary) → REST fallback → taker_ratio computation
Robust Indicator Scoring Chain: envelope_indicators → validate → calculate_score_with_confidence → persist_snapshot
Futures Scanner 5-Layer Scoring: L1 Liquidity + L2 Structure + L3 Momentum + L4 Volatility + L5 OrderFlow
market_metadata Anti-Deadlock: sorted-symbol UPSERT across collect_all + collect_5m + fallback paths
Pipeline L3 Live Flow Gate: staleness check (data_age_seconds ≤ 15s) before order flow injection
OHLCV Data Source Fallback Chain: Gate.io primary (≥50 candles) → Binance fallback → merged deduplicated DataFrame
Indicator Freshness/Quality System: STALENESS_PENALTY + CONFIDENCE_MAP + can_trade gating
